title: lonicera glehnii var. viridissima
intro: Lonicera glehnii var. viridissima, also known as the Chinese honeysuckle or green-flowered honeysuckle, is a plant species belonging to the honeysuckle family (Caprifoliaceae). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiviral, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory properties, which are attributed to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Lonicera glehnii var. viridissima include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. In traditional Chinese medicine, the plant is often prepared as a tea or tincture, and its aerial parts can also be dried and used in herbal infusions or capsules.
